name: When is it worth hiring a GEO specialist?
description: Hire help when the site is large, competition is high, or you need a coordinated strategy across many pages or locations.

mainEntity.name: When is it worth hiring a GEO specialist?

acceptedAnswer.text: You should hire help when your site is large, your industry is competitive, or your current content is not being used in AI answers despite good SEO. A specialist can also help if you need schema, measurement, and content strategy aligned across multiple teams or locations. If you are only fixing a handful of pages, you may not need outside support yet.
acceptedAnswer.description: Hire help when the site is large, competition is high, or you need a coordinated strategy across many pages or locations.
